en.name: Level 49 — The Unfilled River of Phlegethon
en.shortDescription: An infinite WWI-style trench network where automated war machines patrol and unseen forces fatally punish any attempt to escape.
en.atmosphere: A desolate warzone of ceaseless gunfire, dense fog and floods, with mechanical horrors hunting through the mud-filled trenches.
en.tips: Hide in bunkers during bombardments. Move quietly in groups. Avoid armor that escalates the machines. Never try to leave.
